Bill Payment API (paybill) returns HTTP 200 but may reject duplicate transactions. All unified redeem APIs working correctly.

context_for_next_testing_agent:
## Eko Payment Integration Testing Summary

### Working APIs (Verified):
1. GET /api/eko/balance - Returns balance 0.0 INR (auth working)
2. GET /api/eko/config - Returns configured:true, production environment
3. GET /api/eko/bbps/operators/mobile_prepaid - Returns 6 operators (Airtel, Jio, Vi, BSNL, MTNL)
4. GET /api/eko/charges/calculate - Correct formula: ₹10 flat + 20% admin
5. GET /api/redeem/services - Returns all 6 services
6. GET /api/redeem/calculate-charges - Correct PRC calculation
7. GET /api/redeem/admin/stats - Returns stats by status and service
8. GET /api/redeem/admin/requests - Paginated results with filters
9. POST /api/redeem/admin/approve - Validation working
10. POST /api/redeem/admin/complete - Validation working

### Auth Algorithm Verified:
- Secret-key: HMAC-SHA256(base64_encoded_key, timestamp)
- Request-hash: HMAC-SHA256(base64_encoded_key, timestamp + utility_acc_no + amount + user_code)
- Timestamp: 13 digits (milliseconds)

### test-all-methods Results:
- Working combination: secret_key_method='encoded', request_hash_method='old_format_encoded'
- Returns 'Success Last_used_OkeyKey: 6' when successful

### Known Issues:
- /api/eko/test-recharge returns 'No key for Response' - may be duplicate transaction rejection
- Balance is 0.0 INR - Eko wallet needs funding for live recharges

### Test Credentials:
- Test user: testuser@test.com / test123
- Admin: admin@paras.com / test123
features_tested: Eko Secret Key Generation - format verified correct

Mobile Prepaid Operators API - WORKING (6 operators)
Unified Redeem Services API - WORKING (6 services)
